images.caption: Stainless centrifugal blower under fabrication, with sheet-metal rolls in the background — Sahasra workshop, Jeedimetla.
Heavy industrial blower being crane-lifted for shipment from the Sahasra workshop.
Centrifugal blower with direct-coupled motor, finished and ready for dispatch.
Single-stage centrifugal blower with motor — finished and inspected on the shop floor.
Blower housings and impeller discs lined up during a production batch.
Large stainless-steel centrifugal blower — shown for scale at our Jeedimetla workshop.
Front view of a heavy-duty stainless centrifugal blower built to spec.
Inspection detail on a large stainless centrifugal blower before delivery.
The team beside a finished heavy-duty centrifugal blower at the Sahasra workshop.
Final inspection of a large fabricated blower before despatch.
Heavy-gauge industrial blower, painted and finished — ready for installation.
Stainless centrifugal blower with belt-drive arrangement, V-pulleys and bearing housing.
Belt-drive centrifugal blower — alternate view showing access ports and frame.
Twin-inlet centrifugal blower — rear view, showing impeller through the housing.
Twin-inlet centrifugal blower — front view, finished housing and discharge.
Compact direct-drive centrifugal blower in the assembly bay.
Batch of centrifugal blowers in the final assembly line.
Pair of stainless centrifugal blowers prepared and packed for dispatch.
Direct-drive centrifugal blower delivered to a client site.
